title: loxogramme dictyopteris
intro: Loxogramme dictyopteris, also known as the shield fern, is a species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae. The plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to reduce pain and prevent infection. The health benefits of Loxogramme dictyopteris include its ability to aid in the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve respiratory health. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and made into tea or infusions, which can be used to treat various health issues, although the effectiveness and safety of these preparations should be further studied.
